pdv.name: PDV
pdv.description: PDV is a self-hosted download manager with a persistent queue, retry/backoff worker engine, REST API, and CLI.

alembic-cli.name: Alembic CLI
alembic-cli.description: Project Alembic – Universal Transformer-to-SSM distillation with in-training CompreSSM compression (ICLR 2026).

go-webinspect.name: Go WebInspect
go-webinspect.description: go-webinspect is a professional-grade, open-source framework written entirely in Go that provides a complete,  high-powered suite of web inspection, traffic analysis, and reverse-engineering tools.

go-ddgs-stealth.name: Go DDGS Stealth
go-ddgs-stealth.description: Advanced stealth web scraping framework for Go, extending go-ddgs with browser-level evasion, StealthyFetcher, and resilient anti-bot capabilities.

gorkbot.name: Gorkbot
gorkbot.description: Gorkbot is an AI-powered orchestration platform that unifies multiple large language models into a single terminal interface.

vcse.name: VCSE
vcse.description: VCSE (Verifier-Centered Symbolic Engine) is the verification and reasoning engine for Correctness Models (CMs).
